title: Direcciones
description: Moverse y explicar hacia dónde ir.

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Is it time to go home?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L07-02 - E1072 - Ethan - Is it time to go home.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Can I borrow a pencil?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L13-01 - E1131 - Ethan - Can I borrow a pencil.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: I want to go to the library.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L16-02 - E1162 - Ethan - I want to go to the library.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: I walk home.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L20-04 - E1204 - Noah - I walk home.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: You should go to the nurse.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L36-06 - E1366 - Noah - You should go to the nurse.mp3

items.speaker: Woman
items.text: Turn left at the traffic light.
items.translation: Gire a la izquierda en el semáforo.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L41-04 - E1414 - Woman - Turn left at the traffic light.mp3

items.speaker: Mother
items.text: We need to open an account.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B1/audio/L42-02 - E1422 - Mother - We need to open an account.mp3

items.speaker: Ethan
items.text: Can I come with you?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L04-06 - E2046 - Ethan - Can I come with you.mp3

items.speaker: Worker
items.text: Yes, his owner has just arrived.
items.translation: Sí, su dueño acaba de llegar.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L07-05 - E2075 - Worker - Yes, his owner has just arrived.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: I've just ordered a new backpack online.
items.translation: Acabo de pedir una mochila nueva por internet.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L18-01 - E2181 - Emma - I've just ordered a new backpack online.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: When will it arrive?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L18-06 - E2186 - Noah - When will it arrive.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: Should I boil the water?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L20-04 - E2204 - Mia - Should I boil the water.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: And we shouldn't sleep too late.
items.translation: Y no deberíamos dormir demasiado tarde.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L22-05 - E2225 - Emma - And we shouldn't sleep too late.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: Can I go to school tomorrow?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L23-06 - E2236 - Noah - Can I go to school tomorrow.mp3

items.speaker: Emma
items.text: If the weather improves, we can go outside later.
items.translation: Si mejora el clima, podemos salir después.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L27-05 - E2275 - Emma - If the weather improves, we can go outside later.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: How are we getting there?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L31-02 - E2312 - Mia - How are we getting there.mp3

items.speaker: Noah
items.text: Yes, the paths might be muddy.
items.translation: Sí, los caminos podrían estar lodosos.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L32-04 - E2324 - Noah - Yes, the paths might be muddy.mp3

items.speaker: Manager
items.text: You have to arrive ten minutes early.
items.translation: Tienes que llegar diez minutos antes.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L40-01 - E2401 - Manager - You have to arrive ten minutes early.mp3

items.speaker: Manager
items.text: First, check the front table.
items.translation: Primero, revisa la mesa de adelante.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L40-03 - E2403 - Manager - First, check the front table.mp3

items.speaker: Mia
items.text: What would you choose if you had to decide now?
items.translation: ¿Qué elegirías si tuvieras que decidir ahora?
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L45-02 - E2452 - Mia - What would you choose if you had to decide now.mp3

items.speaker: Mr. Carter
items.text: You might go to Canada, Australia, or Spain.
items.translation: Podrían ir a Canadá, Australia o España.
items.audio_path: books/HE-B2/audio/L47-03 - E2473 - Mr. Carter - You might go to Canada, Australia, or Spain.mp3

items.speaker: Ava
items.text: I don't mean that.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L01-01 - BR1011 - Ava - I don't mean that.mp3

items.speaker: Ava
items.text: I mean we should leave later.
items.translation: Quiero decir que deberíamos salir más tarde.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L01-03 - BR1013 - Ava - I mean we should leave later.mp3

items.speaker: Nora
items.text: The bus is usually late on Fridays.
items.translation: El autobús suele llegar tarde los viernes.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L07-01 - BR1071 - Nora - The bus is usually late on Fridays.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: So you want to leave earlier?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L07-02 - BR1072 - Leo - So you want to leave earlier.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: I'm on my way.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L09-02 - BR1092 - Leo - I'm on my way.mp3

items.speaker: Ava
items.text: When will you arrive?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L09-05 - BR1095 - Ava - When will you arrive.mp3

items.speaker: Nora
items.text: Can you get here by seven?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L10-04 - BR1104 - Nora - Can you get here by seven.mp3

items.speaker: Ava
items.text: Can you get the file too?
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L11-05 - BR1115 - Ava - Can you get the file too.mp3

items.speaker: Ben
items.text: We could grab something to eat.
items.translation: Podríamos ir por algo de comer.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L12-05 - BR1125 - Ben - We could grab something to eat.mp3

items.speaker: Nora
items.text: I can't make it tonight.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L25-01 - BR1251 - Nora - I can't make it tonight.mp3

items.speaker: Nora
items.text: We don't have to argue with everyone.
items.translation: No tenemos que discutir con todos.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L35-04 - BR1354 - Nora - We don't have to argue with everyone.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: If something goes wrong, keep going.
items.translation: Si algo sale mal, sigue adelante.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L43-04 - BR1434 - Leo - If something goes wrong, keep going.mp3

items.speaker: Leo
items.text: At first, I tried to translate every word.
items.translation: Al principio intentaba traducir cada palabra.
items.audio_path: books/HE-Bridge/audio/L44-01 - BR1441 - Leo - At first, I tried to translate every word.mp3
